title: Paperclip Android App Spike + Shell Implementation
description:
Run architecture + implementation spike for Android app in `/home/avi/projects/paperclip`.

Scope:
- Choose stack and justify (Expo React Native vs alternatives)
- Scaffold app shell
- Implement authenticated issue inbox screen backed by Paperclip API (read-only)
- Add run instructions for local Android emulator/device

Acceptance:
- Working app shell committed in workspace with run steps
- Short ADR-style note explaining stack trade-offs
- Demo evidence (logs/screenshots references) in issue comment

title: SDL-Orchestration: Manual parity reconciliation against Orbital upstream
description:
## Why
OTTAA-32 confirmed non-trivial divergence between `/home/avi/projects/sdl-orchestration` and Orbital upstream content (`/home/avi/projects/orbital/clients/stake-link/sdl`). Auto-sync is unsafe.

## Scope
1. Reconcile parity diffs from `./scripts/check_orbital_parity.sh`
2. Preserve SDL-local changes that are intentional (`README/docs` workflow docs, MCP test key-loading fix, monitoring guardrail/rate-limit updates)
3. Resolve code-level drifts in: `orchestration/mcp_server.py`, `monitoring/src/mcp/utils.ts`, `tests/test_mcp_e2e.py`, and RAG tooling scripts
4. Re-run parity check to zero unexpected diffs
5. Document sync procedure so future Orbital->SDL sync is deterministic

## Suggested Owner
Founding Engineer (`/agents/founding-engineer`)

## Acceptance
- Parity check passes or an approved allowlist of intentional SDL-specific deltas exists
- No regressions in MCP E2E tests
- Sync recommendation posted back on parent issue

title: Automated Invoice Generation + Email Delivery
description:
Build invoice generation system with PDF export and email delivery to tenants.

**Scope:**
- Monthly invoice generation (BullMQ cron job)
- PDF invoice template (Hebrew, includes line items, tax, payment terms)
- Invoice numbering scheme (legal compliant for Israel)
- Email delivery via Notifications service
- Invoice webhook for Green Invoice integration (future)
- Admin override: manual invoice creation

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Nightly job creates invoices for all active subscriptions on billing day
- Invoice PDF generated with proper Hebrew formatting
- Email sent to tenant admin with PDF attachment
- Invoice stored in S3/local storage with signed URL
- Invoice table updated with `sent_at`, `pdf_url`
- Failed deliveries logged and retried
- Admin can trigger manual invoice via Portal admin panel

**Files:**
- `services/core/src/jobs/generate-monthly-invoices.ts`
- `services/core/src/lib/invoice-pdf-generator.ts`
- `services/notifications/src/templates/invoice-email.ts` (Hebrew)
- `services/portal/app/api/admin/billing/invoices/generate/route.ts`

**Dependencies:** 
- [OTTAA-11] (subscription data)
- Notifications service operational

**Recommended assignee:** Founding Engineer

title: Usage-Based Billing Foundation (AI Costs Tracking)
description:
Implement usage tracking for AI API costs and prepare for usage-based billing tiers.

**Scope:**
- Track AI Assistant API usage per tenant (Claude API, tokens consumed)
- Track Intelligence service analysis runs per tenant
- Store usage events in `usage_events` table (new)
- Daily rollup job to aggregate usage metrics
- Admin dashboard view: usage by tenant, cost breakdown
- Overage alerts (when tenant exceeds plan limits)
- Foundation for future usage-based pricing (e.g., ₪X per 1000 AI requests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- AI Assistant logs usage events on every Claude API call
- Intelligence service logs analysis run costs
- Daily job aggregates usage into `usage_rollups` table
- Admin can view tenant usage in Portal: `/admin/tenants/[id]?tab=usage`
- System sends alert when tenant hits 80% of plan limit
- Usage data tied to subscription billing period
- Export usage data to CSV for manual billing

**Files:**
- `services/ai-assistant/src/lib/usage-tracker.ts`
- `services/intelligence/src/lib/usage-tracker.ts`
- `services/core/migrations/0005_usage_tracking.sql`
- `services/core/src/jobs/rollup-daily-usage.ts`
- `services/portal/app/api/admin/tenants/[id]/usage/route.ts`

**Dependencies:** 
- [OTTAA-11] (subscription plan limits)
- Intelligence service deployed

**Recommended assignee:** Founding Engineer
